rulings.Case Title: DIANE TALLEY-EVANS et al VS. HAIGHT STREET MORTGAGE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 17, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT HSM SF INC.'s Motion For Attorneys Fees DENIED. CC&Rs attorney's fees clause and CC 5975 are not applicable to the case at bar based on allegations of unlawful lockout that occurred on April 23, 2013. No evidence or authority cited for the proposition that the allegations in the complaint are "inextricably intertwined with" and "in retaliation to" Defendants action to enforce the CC&Rs November 2011. = (501/JKS)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 17, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANTs THAI CHIU, KAMAN LIU, CHEUK YAN and TINA YAN's Motion To Reconsider Order Denying Defendants Cheuk Tin Yan, Tina Yan, Thai Ming Chui And Kaman Lius Joint Motion For Sanctions (Pursuant To Ccp 128.7) Filed On June 10, 2015 Continued to July 31, 2015 to be heard by the Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay. = (501/JKS)
